HERMÈS Atlas 42 Shoulder Bag - Etain

Product Details:
Brand: Hermès
Model: Atlas 42 Shoulder Bag
Color: Etain (Pewter Grey)
Dimensions: 42 x 27 x 12 cm
Blind Stamp: Square P
Style: Horizontal shoulder bag with elongated round handles

Features:
Exuding an effortlessly chic, 'old money' aesthetic, this horizontal shoulder bag is incredibly versatile. It features distinctive side details and comfortable long handles perfect for underarm wear. It serves as a fantastic, relaxed alternative to the highly sought-after Kelly Shoulder bag. The spacious design makes it a perfect travel or daily companion, and it offers a great canvas to personalize with your own chains or bag charms.

Condition Report:
Mint / Excellent pre-owned condition (99% new). This piece is an unused closet gem and remains in its original, pristine state with virtually no signs of wear. Please review all photos carefully before placing your order to ensure you are satisfied with the condition.
